name: dokki-mcp
description: Expose Dokki's built-in MCP servers to Codex through a local stdio bridge.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to Dokki workspace tools.
interface.longDescription: A local stdio bridge that lets Codex use Dokki's Streamable HTTP MCP endpoints for workspace documents, tables, artifacts, publishing, search, and memory.
defaultPrompt: Search Dokki for notes about this topic.
Add this fact to Dokki memory.
